generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor I_M providing real‑time current measurements from the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder delivering angular position of the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox providing output shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance RobotController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D robot controller exposing measured angle and other kinematic data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance ControllerAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotController
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft angle (position) from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output shaft angle from gearbox secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance ControllerAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angle data provided by the robot controller (SINUMERIK 840D)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and infrastructure)
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transports live sensor streams from the robot controller to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService,
                    FrictionParameterIdentificationService,
                    FrictionParameterFeedbackService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable simulation environment used for white‑box and black‑box friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for creating Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell manages model and data traceability within the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterFeedbackService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizes measured and simulated data in real time"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services (digital shadow capabilities)
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides unified real‑time visualization of measured sensor data and simulated traces on a web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionParameterInsight,
                    ImprovedPositionalAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Online identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters using combined white‑box (SysML) and black‑box (Simulink) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterFeedbackService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates updated friction parameters and feeds them back to the robot controller for feed‑forward torque compensation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FeedForwardTorqueCompensationAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time extracted static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters from sensor data"
]

instance ImprovedPositionalAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters improve positional accuracy and reduce machining errors"
]

// C17: Actions
instance FeedForwardTorqueCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of the robot controller's feed‑forward torque compensation using identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models (engineering and simulation)
instance SysMLBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox, and encoders of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing rotational and current flows within the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel component in the transmission"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearbox assuming frictionless behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in real‑time during robot operation, continuously ingesting sensor streams and updating friction estimates on the order of the control cycle (up to the robot’s maximum speed of 75 °/s)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow constellation consists of the physical asset (first robot axis), a Purpose component (FrictionDerivation), Source components (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that consume input data traces and execute simulation models, DataTrace and DataPoint entities storing measured and simulated values, and a dashboard service presenting the results."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied in the operational stage of the robot lifecycle, using live measurement data to refine friction models while the robot is machining. It does not cover design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured by traceability of each DataTrace to its generating Processing component and underlying simulation model. Validation is performed by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑included outputs against measured reference traces, enabling continuous multi‑physics‑aware identification of friction parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot controller to the digital shadow via the MQTT publish‑subscribe protocol. Asset Administration Shells provide structured metadata linking data traces to their sources and models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for digital representation of assets and metadata, and SysML as a standardized modeling language."
]
